title: mapArray
description: Keyed iteration. Each item maps once and is keyed by identity. Only new or removed items cause re-computation.
signature: mapArray<T, U>(list: Accessor<readonly T[] | undefined | null | false>, mapFn: (v: Accessor<T>, i: Accessor<number>) => U, options?: { fallback?: Accessor<any>; keyFn?: (item: T) => any }): () => U[]
param_map_fn_desc: Map function. <0>v</0> is an accessor to the item. <1>i</1> is a reactive index.
param_options_desc: Optional. <0>keyFn</0> provides stable identity for items.
usage_one_line_per_tenant: The tenant fleet's <0>FleetStatus</0> maps its reactive tenant roster into one <1>createMemo</1> per tenant, each describing that tenant's deployment. Since <2>mapArray</2> keys by item, a memo is created once when a tenant appears and torn down only when it leaves.
in_the_wild: See these lines track a live fleet in the <0>tenant-fleet walkthrough</0>.
